ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical compound or internal standard */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical compound or internal standard */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the compound (e.g., Internal Standard) */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number for unique identification */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the compound */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier or vendor */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity percentage of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical compound used in the experiment */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename associated with the experiment data */,
  "rt" REAL /* Retention time of the compound */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Peak area of the compound */,
  "response_ratio" REAL /* Response ratio of the compound */,
  "istd_response" REAL /* Internal standard response */,
  "flag_details" TEXT /* Details of any flags raised during the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method or protocol used for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login to the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., GC-MS, HPLC) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument in the laboratory */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the sample is prepared for */,
  "preparation_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was prepared */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the sample prepared */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical compound used in the sample */,
  "preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used to prepare the sample */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator who prepared the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the report is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or abstract of the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument log entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the instrument */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was used */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the instrument after usage */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the instrument was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the instrument was stopped */,
  "hours_used" REAL /* Total hours the instrument was used */,
  "status_at_end" TEXT /* Status of the instrument at the end of the usage (e.g., OK, Service Required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality control test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the quality control test */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality control test */,
  "reference_standard" TEXT /* Reference standard used for comparison */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date for retesting if the sample failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
